dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4796 IS: Stock Buyback Accountability Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schumer (for himself, Mr. Wyden, Ms. Warren, Mr. Reed, Mr. Van Hollen, Mr. Markey, and Mr. Whitehouse) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to increase the rate of the excise tax on the repurchase of corporate stock, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Stock Buyback Accountability Act of 2026.

section.header: Modifications to tax on repurchase of corporate stock

subsection.text: Section 4501(a) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking 1 percent and inserting 4 percent.
Section 4501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking The amount and inserting the following:
by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.header: Exception for stock issued to certain persons
subparagraph.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to so much of the fair market value of any stock issued or provided to—

clause.text: an employee who is a covered employee (within the meaning of section 162(m)(3)) or a specified covered employee (within the meaning of section 162(m)(7)(C)), or

a person (other than an employee described in clause (i)) who receives remuneration (within the meaning of section 162(m)(4)) during any taxable year of the covered corporation beginning after December 31, 2025, in excess of $1,000,000 for services performed by such person for such covered corporation or any specified affiliate of such covered corporation.

subparagraph.text: The amendment made by subsection (a) section shall apply to repurchases (within the meaning of section 4501(c) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986) of stock after the date of the enactment of this Act.

For purposes of applying section 4501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code to any taxable year which includes the date of the enactment of this Act, the amount of the reduction determined under such section for such taxable year shall be applied—

clause.text: by reducing stock repurchased on or before such date of enactment in the amount which bears the same ratio to the total amount of the reduction so determined for such taxable year as—

subclause.text: the number of days in the taxable year on or before such date of enactment, bears to
the total number of days in such taxable year, and

clause.text: by reducing stock repurchased after such date of the enactment by the excess (if any) of the total amount of the reduction so determined for such taxable year over the amount of the reduction determined under clause (i).

paragraph.text: The amendments made by subsection (b) shall apply to stock issued or provided in taxable years ending more than 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act.
